title: Elglih

{{Quote|You can do us both the most good by remaining king. By ruling your people with compassion, with justice… and with a strong bond to the Rebel Alliance.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
'''Elglih''' was an aging [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Serp]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]] with his wife during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A committed opponent of the Serp [[King/Legends|King]] [[S'Shah]], Elglih began training for a deadly [[Doom-Joust/Legends|Doom-Joust]] in an effort to seize the throne, despite his advanced age. However, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] agreed to serve as his squire and fight in his stead, resulting in Elglih being crowned the new King and swearing allegiance to the Rebel Alliance.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I had to practice for the Doom-Jousts. I had to. They are the only hope for my people... and my world!|Elglih|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Serp]], Elglih lived with his wife in a meager hut in a forested region of [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]] known as [[Harmony Glade]]. Once, he was a proud and able-bodied member of his [[Species/Legends|species]], but like many others, he was forced to watch his society fall into decline under the rule of a monarch known as [[King/Legends|King]] [[S'Shah]]. [[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Elglih was hunting through the marshlands near his home when a vicious [[Unidentified carnivorous Serphidian plant|carnivorous plant]] attacked him. Elglih would have been consumed had it not been for the timely arrival of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer named [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had set out to rescue a fellow [[Cinda Tarheel|Rebel pilot]] S'Shah's forces had captured. Skywalker saved the old Serp from the creature and safely returned him to his home.<ref name="marvel64" />

Over dinner, Elglih told Skywalker the history of his people and how they came to be under S'Shah's rule. He further announced that he was going to challenge the monarch to face him in an event known as a [[Doom-Joust/Legends|Doom-Joust]], which served as he only way that S'Shah could be replaced as king. Knowing that he was too old and infirm to actually prevail against S'Shah, Elglih got the youthful Skywalker to serve as his squire, which allowed Skywalker to serve as his champion and fight in his place—a gambit that paid off when Skywalker defeated the King. Although Skywalker had a claim to the throne as S'Shah's slayer, he allowed Elglih to take the throne, crowning him as the new monarch. Elglih pledged his loyalty to the Rebel Alliance and vowed to do everything within his power to keep [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] influences off Serphidi.<ref name="marvel64" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Since that time, many have tried—all have failed. I must not fail!|Elglih|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
Elderly and white-bearded by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Elglih was possessed of a strong sense of duty towards his people and his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], and came to saw putting himself on the line in a Doom-Joust as the only way he could help Serphidi—even though he knew he had little chance of coming out alive. S'Shah had previously altered the tradition of the Doom-Joust to make them contests to the death, which Elglih saw as a barbarous practice, but necessary for him to participate in. However, Elglih was also cunning, and impressed by Luke Skywalker's strength, saw the young Human as his ticket to success.

==Behind the scenes==
Elglih appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Michael Fleisher]], illustrated by [[Joe Brozowski]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel64" />
